title: azure-kv: fetch() maps network/5xx errors to Backend instead of Unavailable
description: fetch() maps all non-404 azure_core errors to SecretError::Backend. Network failures and 5xx responses (transient) are indistinguishable from 4xx permanent errors. Trigger: Azure KV is temporarily unreachable, or responds with 5xx. Bad behavior: caller treats a transient outage as a permanent error and gives up.
